The '''Disac pirates''' was a band of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], which operated in the area around the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]. They became such a problem for both illegal and legal shipping that [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] intervened to have the group eliminated.

Black Sun leader Prince [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] dispatched his [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] "shadow killer" [[Ket Maliss]] to tend to the group. Afterwards, Maliss eliminated almost the entire organization. Even though [[Morturr Heth|some]] of the members managed to escape the massacre, the Disac pirates ceased to exist afterwards.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Running the Sisar|book=Secrets of the Sisar Run}}
